messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

KEPServerEX v6.0 to v6.9, ThingWorx Kepware Server v6.8 and v6.9, ThingWorx Industrial Connectivity (all versions), OPC-Aggregator (all versions), Rockwell Automation KEPServer Enterprise, GE Digital Industrial Gateway Server v7.68.804 and v7.66, and Software Toolbox TOP Server all 6.x versions, are vulnerable to a heap-based buffer overflow. Opening a specifically crafted OPC UA message could allow an attacker to crash the server and potentially leak data.

The software products KEPServerEX (versions 6.0 to 6.9), ThingWorx Kepware Server (versions 6.8 and 6.9), ThingWorx Industrial Connectivity (all versions), OPC-Aggregator (all versions), Rockwell Automation KEPServer Enterprise, GE Digital Industrial Gateway Server (versions 7.68.804 and 7.66), and all 6.x versions of Software Toolbox TOP Server have a vulnerability related to heap-based buffer overflow. By sending a specially crafted OPC UA message, an attacker could crash the server and possibly extract sensitive information.
